case_title: AARON C RHODES et al VS. CLIFFORD YOUNG et al

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,250.00 FILED BY RHODES, AARON C MCGOWAN, PATRICIA AS TO DEFENDANT YOUNG, CLIFFORD YOUNG, JANE ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUN-06-2008 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RHODES, AARON C MCGOWAN, PATRICIA RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT YOUNG, CLIFFORD YOUNG, JANE $945.00 PRINCIPAL, $35.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $980.00, IF PLAINTIFF HAS ACCEPTED AND NEGOTIATED THE PREVIOUS PARTIAL REFUND OF $710.00, DEFENDANT SHALL RECEIVE CREDIT FOR THAT PAYMENT AGAINST THIS JUDGMENT. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
REQUEST TO ENTER SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT PURSUANT TO CCP 116.850. REQUEST GRANTED. -JUDGE DONALD S MITCHELL- FILED BY DEFENDANT YOUNG, CLIFFORD
COPYING FEES PAID BY PLAINTIFF RHODES, AARON C
RETURN OF NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT - SENT TO JANE YOUNG
